title: Pope arrives in Gran Canaria to meet migrants and celebrate mass before 40,000 people
content: Leo XIV visits Gran Canaria to meet migrants and volunteers in Arguineguín before leading a large open-air mass attended by thousands on the island.

title: Eurogroup chief tells Euronews 'fiscal policy must not contradict ECB' effort to tame inflation

title: Can France's justice system really review 70,000 child sexual abuse cases in five weeks?

title: Brussels set to unveil plan to lower electricity bills amid energy crisis
